hero.title: Packers & Movers in Dadra, Nagar Haveli & Daman
hero.subtitle: Silvassa to Daman and Diu — 918+ verified movers across this coastal Union Territory.

intro:
The Union Territory of Dadra, Nagar Haveli & Daman is one of India's fastest industrialising regions, with Silvassa hosting hundreds of manufacturing units and Daman offering a coastal lifestyle close to Mumbai and Surat. ShiftIndia connects you with 918+ verified movers across Silvassa, Daman and Diu.

From Silvassa's industrial estates and worker housing to Daman's heritage Portuguese town and Diu's island resort district, our KYC-verified vendors handle every category of home and business relocation across this UT.
whyUs: The UT's proximity to Gujarat and Maharashtra means most moves involve cross-state logistics. Our vendors have excellent connectivity with Mumbai, Surat and Ahmedabad networks, offer ₹5 lakh damage coverage and GPS tracking on every move.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Dadra, Nagar Haveli & Daman?
faqs.a: Local moves within Silvassa or Daman start at ₹5,000. Silvassa to Mumbai (190 km) typically costs ₹8,000–₹14,000. Silvassa to Surat (90 km) costs ₹6,000–₹10,000.

faqs.q: Which cities does ShiftIndia cover in this UT?
faqs.a: We cover Silvassa (Dadra & Nagar Haveli), Daman and Diu across the Union Territory.

faqs.q: Can you handle industrial equipment relocation in Silvassa?
faqs.a: Yes. Our vendors have experience with industrial machinery moves in Silvassa's manufacturing zones, including disassembly, rigging and reassembly services.

faqs.q: Do you connect Daman and Diu with Gujarat and Mumbai?
faqs.a: Yes. Daman–Mumbai, Diu–Ahmedabad and Silvassa–Surat are our most common routes, all with GPS tracking and transit insurance.
